summary: Performed frontend review of PR #35. Found one bug: error notifications for Save/Load are misclassified as success due to incorrect detection in Notification.tsx. Requested changes. All other aspects (XSS sanitization, accessibility, test IDs, code quality) are satisfactory. Awaiting fix.
human_review_required: Fix error detection in Notification.tsx: change isError condition to notification.toLowerCase().includes('error') to properly classify Save/Load errors.
